instruction_summary: Capture full-page screenshots for /mnt/c/work/self/docs-portal using scripts/playwright.sh, and inspect why /mnt/c/work/_codex-tools/skills/capture-screenshots/SKILL.md lives outside the normal skill directory.
actual_work: Reviewed the minimum workspace and repo policies, inspected the screenshot tooling, confirmed the repo root resolves to /home/matsu/work/repos/docs-portal, added a development-only /capture_login helper, created repo-local screenshot config under .codex-screenshots, queried seed-backed route identifiers from the running app, and captured 42 full-page screenshots with the shared Windows Chrome-based screenshot command to avoid Japanese font corruption.

commands.notes: Confirmed the app container was running and publishing port 3000.

commands.command: docker compose exec -T app bin/rails runner ...
commands.notes: Read project codes, document slugs, version public_ids, and users from the running seed data.
Captured 42 PNG files plus index.txt to /home/matsu/work/repos/docs-portal/tmp/screenshots using Windows Chrome.

tests.notes: Verified Japanese text rendered correctly in a captured image.

usage.token_notes: Token counts are unavailable unless provided by the CLI/API.

usage_notes.token_notes: Token counts are unavailable unless provided by the CLI/API.

quality_notes: Switched to the Windows Chrome-based shared capture flow after confirming Linux Playwright risked missing Japanese font dependencies.
risks: A development-only capture_login route now exists and should stay limited to development.
The dashboard and recent-document screenshots include extra sample data from the EXT_TOYOKOKEN seed project because that data exists in the running environment.
remaining_concerns: The screenshot output lives under the real git root /home/matsu/work/repos/docs-portal/tmp/screenshots, not the /mnt/c/work/self/docs-portal symlink path.
The user originally asked for scripts/playwright.sh, but the stable font-safe capture path in this workspace is the shared _codex-tools command rather than the thin Playwright CLI wrapper.

signals.note: Created the prompt log stub before deeper repo exploration.
Used the Windows Chrome-based shared screenshot tool to avoid Japanese font corruption seen in Linux Playwright captures.
